creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194392
v4l_compat-1.6.3_1

I have created a port for dvb-apps [1] which uses a lot of v4l stuff and found that include/linux/net.h is not installed. It is already present in the linux-3.16.7-dvb-headers.tar.xz distfile so it was just a matter of installing it.

[1] https://linuxtv.org/hg/dvb-apps
